text: You have power over your mind — not outside events. Realize this, and you will find strength.
The wound is the place where the Light enters you. Do not turn away from what cracks you open.
An oak tree grows from an acorn. A journey of healing begins with this single day.
Do not dwell in the past, do not dream of the future, concentrate the mind on the present moment.
It is not that we have a short time to live, but that we waste much of it. Life is long enough if it is well spent.
Out beyond ideas of wrongdoing and rightdoing, there is a field. I'll meet you there.
No one saves us but ourselves. No one can and no one may. We ourselves must walk the path.
The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way.
Your task is not to seek for love, but merely to seek and find all the barriers within yourself that you have built against it.
Recovery is not a race. You don't have to feel guilty for taking your time. You don't have to feel guilty for being alive.
The mind is everything. What you think, you become.
How long are you going to wait before you demand the best for yourself? The philosopher's life should begin now.
Don't be satisfied with stories of how things have gone with others. Unfold your own myth.
Sobriety is not the absence of something. It's the presence of everything you were too numb to feel.
First say to yourself what you would be, and then do what you have to do.
Hatred does not cease by hatred at any time. Hatred ceases by love. This is an ancient law.
Yesterday I was clever, so I wanted to change the world. Today I am wise, so I am changing myself.
You are not your worst day. You are not the thing that happened to you. You are what you do next.
When you arise in the morning, think of what a precious privilege it is to be alive — to breathe, to think, to enjoy, to love.
The only way to make sense out of change is to plunge into it, move with it, and join the dance.
Peace comes from within. Do not seek it without.
The soul that is attached to anything, however much good there may be in it, will not arrive at the liberty of the divine.
Waste no more time arguing about what a good person should be. Be one.
The bravest thing you ever did was decide to try again. Not for the first time — for the next time.
Better than a thousand hollow words is one word that brings peace.
Make the best use of what is in your power, and take the rest as it happens.
Let yourself be silently drawn by the strange pull of what you really love. It will not lead you astray.
You do not need to be perfect. You need to be present. Show up today. That is enough.
Very little is needed to make a happy life; it is all within yourself, in your way of thinking.
In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity. The obstacle is the teacher.
Wear your heart on your sleeve. The one you are becoming is not ashamed of tenderness.
All that we are is the result of what we have thought. The mind is everything.
If you are irritated by every rub, how will your mirror be polished?
It is not because things are difficult that we do not dare; it is because we do not dare that things are difficult.
The quiet voice inside you that says 'keep going' — that voice is you. The real you. Listen to it.
Thousands of candles can be lighted from a single candle, and the life of the candle will not be shortened. Happiness never decreases by being shared.
What you seek is seeking you. Stay open to the arrival.
Choose not to be harmed — and you won't feel harmed. Don't feel harmed — and you haven't been.
Addiction told you that you were alone. Recovery will show you that was the biggest lie of all.
There is no path to happiness. Happiness is the path.
We suffer more often in imagination than in reality. Name the fear, and half its power dissolves.
The breeze at dawn has secrets to tell you. Don't go back to sleep.
Healing is not linear. Some days you will feel it all at once. That is not failure — that is thawing.
To keep the body in good health is a duty. Otherwise we shall not be able to keep the mind strong and clear.
People are not disturbed by things, but by the views they take of them.
The morning wind spreads its fresh smell. We must get up and take that in. The people who walk at dawn have stories to tell.
You have survived every single bad day you've ever had. Your track record is 100%. Remember that.
If you light a lamp for someone else, it will also brighten your own way.
Circumstances don't make the person; they reveal the person.
Stop acting so small. You are the universe in ecstatic motion.
The person you were before the addiction is still in there, waiting. Patient. Hopeful. Go find them.
In separateness lies the world's great misery; in compassion lies the world's true strength.
Accept whatever comes to you woven in the pattern of your destiny, for what could more aptly fit your needs?
Respond to every call that excites your spirit. Do not wait for permission to feel alive.
You don't owe anyone your recovery story. But one day, someone will need to hear it. Be ready.
An unexamined life is not worth living. But an examined life, lived with intention — that is everything.
True happiness comes from the joy of deeds well done, the zest of creating things new.
The present moment is filled with joy and happiness. If you are attentive, you will see it.
Courage is not the absence of fear. It is the decision that something else is more important than fear. Today, your life is more important.
Tell me, what is it you plan to do with your one wild and precious life?
